title: Donut SMP Money tagger
description: Show Donut SMP balance of any Player on any Server next to their Name.
body:
# Donut SMP Balance Tagger
Shows Donut SMP balance for any player on any Server in:
* tab-list
* next to name-tag
![tablist preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec418b9390e09849fdc351e562e847610b1be3fb.png)
Also this Mod requires a Donut SMP API key, which can be requested on donutsmp.net using /api. You will need to put the key inside of .minecraft/config/donutsmp-tagger.json!

(also this project is completly unofficial)
